subcodes.first_line: O phoenix of that immortal flame kindled in the sacred Tree! Baha'u'llah
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای سمندر نار موقده در سدره سیناء جمال مبارک روحی و ذاتی و کینونتی لارقائه
subcodes.subjects: @walking the spiritual path; spiritual wayfaring; the virtuous life, @call to action, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
